sqlMap.select: select * from FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsFinancialPlansPreparing IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt IsSecuritiesSales IsContractualRelationShip IsOmissionsPolicy IsAnyNonPublicInvestments IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsFinancialPlansPreparing# #IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt# #IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt# #IsSecuritiesSales# #IsContractualRelationShip# #IsOmissionsPolicy# #IsAnyNonPublicInvestments# #IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed# #IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan# )
sqlMap.select: select IsFinancialPlansPreparing, IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt, IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt, IsSecuritiesSales, IsContractualRelationShip, IsOmissionsPolicy, IsAnyNonPublicInvestments, IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed, IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp set
IsFinancialPlansPreparing = #IsFinancialPlansPreparing# IsFinancialPlansPreparing = null IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt = #IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt# IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt = null IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt = #IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt# IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt = null IsSecuritiesSales = #IsSecuritiesSales# IsSecuritiesSales = null IsContractualRelationShip = #IsContractualRelationShip# IsContractualRelationShip = null IsOmissionsPolicy = #IsOmissionsPolicy# IsOmissionsPolicy = null IsAnyNonPublicInvestments = #IsAnyNonPublicInvestments# IsAnyNonPublicInvestments = null IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed = #IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed# IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed = null IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan = #IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan# IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsFinancialPlansPreparing, IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt, IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt, IsSecuritiesSales, IsContractualRelationShip, IsOmissionsPolicy, IsAnyNonPublicInvestments, IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed, IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsFinancialPlansPreparing, IsDiscretionaryAssetMangt, IsNonDiscretionaryAssetMangt, IsSecuritiesSales, IsContractualRelationShip, IsOmissionsPolicy, IsAnyNonPublicInvestments, IsAnyFirmAffiliateLicensed, IsAnyEmployeeBenefitPlan from FinancialPlanningAndIAServiceSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
